name: Copper Carrots
recipeIngredient: 1 small green pepper, thinly sliced into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook carrots in boiling salted water until fork tender.
2. When the vegetables are cool, alternate layers of carrot slices with pepper and onion slices.
3. In a saucepan, combine Worcestershire sauce and remaining ingredients (sugar, vinegar, mustard, tomato soup, salad oil, salt, and pepper).
4. Cook over heat until the mixture is well combined.
5. Pour the sauce mixture evenly over the layered vegetables.
6. Cover and refrigerate for at least a few days to allow flavors to develop.
7. Serve as an appetizer or with meat.
